case_title: HANEY, SONDRALYN VS SAHAGAN, DAVID IND & DBA CASTRO ST CHEVRON SERVICE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,609.59 FILED BY HANEY, SONDRALYN AS TO DEFENDANT SAHAGAN, DAVID IND & DBA CASTRO ST CHEVRON SERVICE CHEVRON CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO DAVID SAHAGAN RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HANEY, SONDRALYN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAHAGAN, DAVID IND & DBA CASTRO ST CHEVRON SERVICE $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $420.00, COURT FINDS CAR WAS DAMAGED ON LOT, BUT THAT, BE- CAUSE OF PRE-EXISTING DAMAGE, DEFT SHOULD NOT BEAR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
